concept: A person speaking into a vintage microphone with emotion radar chart arcs — joy, anger, sadness, empathy — radiating outward in a flat illustration style using soft teal and coral palette

A prediction model output box on the left connected by a dotted arrow to an intervention action card on the right, with a curved feedback loop returning upward, in flat illustration style using navy and amber

A flat illustration of a clinician and an AI display panel standing side by side in a minimal clinic room, with a clear arrow routing control back to the human when a red uncertainty flag appears on the screen

A flat illustration of a globe with speech bubbles in different languages flowing into a central AI assistant interface, while a brand logo is reflected differently in each language panel, showing information quality gaps between markets

A flat illustration of a financial analyst checking off each step on a multi-layer decision checklist, with some boxes marked valid and one flagged with a warning symbol, set against a clean light background
